signals.title: Arkadia Space to supply thrusters for Reflex Aerospace satellite
signals.summary:
Spacecraft propulsion startup Arkadia Space has signed a deal to provide thrusters for a satellite being built by Reflex Aerospace. 
 The post  Arkadia Space to supply thrusters for Reflex Aerospace satellite  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Qatari-donated Air Force One now sports red, white and blue paint job
signals.summary: The interim Air Force One VC-25B Bridge aircraft is undergoing its final modifications ahead of a summer rollout.

signals.title: Germany welcome in GCAP, but new Leonardo boss warns about timing
signals.summary: CEO Lorenzo Mariani said that the advantages of a new partner were extra cash and know-how.

signals.title: German air show opens under shadow of Iran war, fighter project collapse
signals.summary: Airbus, which represented Germany and Spain in FCAS, is increasingly looking to Sweden’s Saab as a preferred partner, according to sources.

signals.title: The US usually sells weapons to Taiwan – with drones, expect the reverse
signals.summary: Taiwan's biggest appeal is the lack of China in the manufacturing supply chain, one analyst said.
